features.name: double inversion in combinational logic
features.description: Code should include a signal with double inversion (e.g., wire out; wire double_inv = ~~out;) used in combinational logic where the optimization should simplify it to the original signal

features.name: overflow detection with xor of inverted signal
features.description: Code should include an overflow detection circuit where the overflow flag is computed using XOR with an inverted signal, which can be affected by improper double inversion optimization
